allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\([{k:v for k,v in e.items\(\) if k in ['id','emp_no','name','department','hire_date','base_salary','is_admin']} for e in data], ensure_ascii=False, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'{len\(data\)} records'\); [print\(r['work_date'], r['clock_in'], '->', r['clock_out'], '|', r['hours']\) for r in data[:5]]")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('count:', d['count']\); [print\(r['employee_id'], r['net_pay']\) for r in d['results']]")
